## New Vehicle Submission

**Vehicle:** <!-- e.g., BYD Seal -->
**Source:** <!-- Link to where you found the rescue sheet -->

### Checklist

- [ ] Vehicle is not already supported (checked the list in CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Vehicle is not already in an open PR
- [ ] PDF is from an official/publicly available source
- [ ] PDF is in English
- [ ] PDF has selectable text (not a scan/photo)
- [ ] `metadata.yaml` is filled in completely
- [ ] Directory follows `MAKE_MODEL` naming convention
- [ ] One vehicle per PR
